name: atlas
description: Deploy-anywhere text-to-SQL agent with auto-generated semantic layer and production-grade security

scripts.dev: bun run --hot packages/api/src/api/server.ts & API_PID=$!; trap 'kill $API_PID 2>/dev/null' EXIT; bun run --filter '@atlas/web' dev
scripts.test: bun run --filter '@atlas/api' test && bun run --filter '@atlas/cli' test && bun run --filter '@atlas/mcp' test && bun run --filter '@atlas/web' test && bun run --filter '@useatlas/sdk' test && bun run --filter '@useatlas/plugin-sdk' test && bun run --filter '@atlas/plugin-jira-action' test && bun run --filter '@atlas/plugin-yaml-context' test && bun run --filter '@atlas/plugin-mcp-interaction' test && bun run --filter '@atlas/plugin-clickhouse-datasource' test && bun run --filter '@atlas/plugin-mysql-datasource' test && bun run --filter '@atlas/plugin-duckdb-datasource' test && bun run --filter '@atlas/plugin-snowflake-datasource' test && bun run --filter '@atlas/plugin-salesforce-datasource' test && bun run --filter '@atlas/plugin-email-action' test && bun run --filter '@atlas/plugin-slack-interaction' test && bun run --filter '@atlas/plugin-nsjail-sandbox' test && bun run --filter '@atlas/plugin-sidecar-sandbox' test && bun run --filter '@atlas/plugin-vercel-sandbox' test && bun run --filter '@atlas/plugin-daytona-sandbox' test && bun run --filter '@atlas/plugin-e2b-sandbox' test
scripts.deps:update: bun update && bun x syncpack fix
